item.title: Men have been saying this forever!!
item.description: A perspective men have repeated for years that is finally getting attention.

media:content.media:title: Men have been saying this forever!!
media:content.media:description: A perspective men have repeated for years that is finally getting attention.

item.title: I wonder if these men know about each other…
item.description: It makes you question how many secrets are hiding in plain sight.

media:content.media:title: I wonder if these men know about each other…
media:content.media:description: It makes you question how many secrets are hiding in plain sight.

item.title: Rejected by a matchmaker
item.description: Sometimes even the professionals say no, and that rejection says more than you think.

media:content.media:title: Rejected by a matchmaker
media:content.media:description: Sometimes even the professionals say no, and that rejection says more than you think.

item.title: She’d probably like the unemployed guy more
item.description: She might claim she wants stability, but her actions tell a very different story.

media:content.media:title: She’d probably like the unemployed guy more
media:content.media:description: She might claim she wants stability, but her actions tell a very different story.

item.title: He’s better off, but a woman should take accountability for divorcing a good man…
item.description: Sometimes walking away benefits him, but true growth begins when accountability replaces blame after leaving a good man.

media:content.media:title: He’s better off, but a woman should take accountability for divorcing a good man…
media:content.media:description: Sometimes walking away benefits him, but true growth begins when accountability replaces blame after leaving a good man.

item.title: You are missing out on the best men…
item.description: You might be overlooking the kind of men who would treat you with loyalty, consistency, and real commitment.

media:content.media:title: You are missing out on the best men…
media:content.media:description: You might be overlooking the kind of men who would treat you with loyalty, consistency, and real commitment.

item.title: This Is A Wife That Truly Appreciates Her Husband!
item.description: A heartfelt look at a wife who genuinely values, respects, and uplifts her husband every single day.

media:content.media:title: This Is A Wife That Truly Appreciates Her Husband!
media:content.media:description: A heartfelt look at a wife who genuinely values, respects, and uplifts her husband every single day.

item.title: I’ll tell you 7 reasons why
item.description: Get ready as I break down seven compelling reasons that might just change the way you see this.

media:content.media:title: I’ll tell you 7 reasons why
media:content.media:description: Get ready as I break down seven compelling reasons that might just change the way you see this.

item.title: There’s a double standard when a man says no…
item.description: When a man sets boundaries, the reaction often reveals a surprising double standard in how we view rejection.

media:content.media:title: There’s a double standard when a man says no…
media:content.media:description: When a man sets boundaries, the reaction often reveals a surprising double standard in how we view rejection.

item.title: Men Will Give You Anything...
item.description: When a man truly cares he will go above and beyond in ways you never expected.

media:content.media:title: Men Will Give You Anything...
media:content.media:description: When a man truly cares he will go above and beyond in ways you never expected.

item.title: Double standards in relationships: 3 not-so-obvious examples!
item.description: Three subtle double standards in relationships that most people overlook but definitely feel.

media:content.media:title: Double standards in relationships: 3 not-so-obvious examples!
media:content.media:description: Three subtle double standards in relationships that most people overlook but definitely feel.

item.title: Another double standards!
item.description: Let’s talk about the frustrating double standards that still show up in everyday situations.

media:content.media:title: Another double standards!
media:content.media:description: Let’s talk about the frustrating double standards that still show up in everyday situations.

item.title: Yes, some guys do just wanna stay single…
item.description: Not every man is avoiding commitment out of fear sometimes he simply chooses the freedom of staying single.

media:content.media:title: Yes, some guys do just wanna stay single…
media:content.media:description: Not every man is avoiding commitment out of fear sometimes he simply chooses the freedom of staying single.

item.title: Some things I agree… Relationships are complex! Especially nowadays
item.description: Relationships today come with mixed signals and evolving expectations that make love more complicated than ever.

media:content.media:title: Some things I agree… Relationships are complex! Especially nowadays
media:content.media:description: Relationships today come with mixed signals and evolving expectations that make love more complicated than ever.
